_comment: WO-105 ship spec: the HDL flagship ships its hdl family -- the pinned pc_incr.v source set plus the hdl.build tier row exactly as the release build discharged it (verilator lint-elaboration; AD-22: nothing re-runs at ship time). No synthesis tier exists, so no netlist -- a named absence. No mech/fluid/board content; those families are named-absent by construction.

debug._comment: WO-125 (D237.2): consumed ONLY by `ship --emit-profile debug`. The flagship declares two spare debug pins for the generated tap module (charter 40 sec. 1); with no board or firmware in this package, channel capacity is capped at the declared-pin count so the tap map never overstates the hardware (sec. 5).
